code: export class GatherProgressParser{constructor(){this._duration=0;this._itemName='';this._icon='';}flush(){this._duration=0;this._itemName='';this._icon='';return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;this._duration=wrapper.readInt();this._itemName=wrapper.readString();this._icon=wrapper.readString();return true;}get duration(){return this._duration;}get itemName(){return this._itemName;}get icon(){return this._icon;}}
